final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input new_bit,
    output reg [3:0] shift_reg);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset)
        shift_reg <= 4'b0;
    else
        shift_reg <= {shift_reg[2:0], new_bit};
end
endmodule
